one_law: Log every outreach row in the repository — insight hook first, Diagnostic URL second. NW1 fires on first ≥$2.5K Diagnostic invoice.

templates.diaspora_dm: Quick observation for {{org}}: most Persian-owned shops here still run client follow-ups across WhatsApp + Excel. We mapped 3 automation leaks like that for a Vancouver SME last month — fixed fee Diagnostic, one week, roadmap PDF. Worth a look? {{diagnostic_url}}

templates.insight_hook: 3 automation leaks I see in {{vertical}} shops in Vancouver — not a pitch deck, just patterns from recent Diagnostics. Reply if you want the checklist.
